free_text: Polarization of neutrons from (d,n) reactions on 11B,
The nitrogen target consisted of 28Si3 14N4 with 28Si
enriched to 99.9%, the boron target consisted of
elementary boron with 11B enriched to 95%; both target
substances were mixed with 10% colloidal 12C for better
heat contact with 0.3 mm thick tantalum backing.
